description: Customer asks two questions, draft only answers one — should fail completeness

inputs.customerMessage: Hi, two questions: (1) can I return a sweater I bought 3 weeks ago, and (2) how long will the refund take once I return it?
inputs.draftContent: Hi Sarah, yes — your sweater is within our 30-day return window, so you can return it. Let me know if you need help starting the return.
chunks: Returns are accepted within 30 days of delivery for unworn items. Once we receive the returned item at our warehouse, refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5-7 business days.
